assets.name: lecture_03_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: This is the strongest frame because the simple Feynman-diagram sketch is already drawn and no longer covered by Susskind’s hand, while the surrounding board content remains more complete than in the later candidates. It preserves both the local diagram and the wider mathematical context: the relativistic energy formulas on the left and the action-like spacetime integral on the right.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: simplest Feynman diagrams you can draw.
assets.caption_hint: simple loop diagram with surrounding field-theory formulas
